author: lOrm
content: Fixed: src/context.rs ContextInjector::inject now bails on hook_result.allowed=false BEFORE collecting system_messages() or constructing the envelope, with tracing::warn audit line. 4 forensic tests added (denied+IGNORE-PREV-INSTR payload byte-identical user msg; denied+no-payload no-op; denied+no-user-msg no fallback system append; allowed positive control). Lib tests: 1498 pass (baseline 1494; +4 new). cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -D warnings exit 0. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. Commit d2ad96b5.
